testcase.name: testSuccessfulSignup

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (145, 666). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [8d73397a09a1b0554d35bfa0dfa56957, clickElement {id=f.F5FB06BB5F5726CAF144D1920F88DFE2.d.D40E9F57F11FDC77C6C88CA10A54C503.e.491}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\wwwda\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59930}, goog:processID: 9468, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59930/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (8d73397a09a1b0554d35bfa0dfa56957)] -> xpath: //a[@id='SideBarLinkSign']] Session ID: 8d73397a09a1b0554d35bfa0dfa56957
